name: long_context_retrieval_v1
description: Single-needle Needle-in-a-Haystack at 4k-128k tokens. One distinctive fact is inserted at a known depth into a long public-domain filler text; the model is asked a question whose answer is only in that fact. Deterministic case-insensitive substring scoring, no LLM judge.
notes: Part A (single-needle) only; multi-needle reasoning is deferred (needs an LLM judge).
Haystacks are Project Gutenberg public-domain texts, fetched on demand via scripts/fetch_haystacks.sh and git-ignored to keep the repo lean.
Needles span >=3 categories (alphanumeric code, date, named entity, location, quantity) so a single (length, depth) cell can draw 8 distinct needles without repeats.
context_lengths/depths/needles_per_cell are config-driven; a deep-dive run can widen the grid.

needles.text: The secret access code for the maintenance hatch is 7B-MIRA-4419.
needles.question: What is the secret access code for the maintenance hatch? Answer with only the code.

needles.text: The vault override sequence recorded by the night supervisor was QX-8830-ZD.
needles.question: What was the vault override sequence recorded by the night supervisor? Answer with only the sequence.

needles.text: Project Zenith was officially launched on November 14, 2023.
needles.question: On what date was Project Zenith officially launched?

needles.text: The Halvorsen trade treaty was signed on March 2, 1987, after years of negotiation.
needles.question: On what date was the Halvorsen trade treaty signed?

needles.text: The chief archivist of the Meridian Institute was Dr. Eleanor Vance.
needles.question: Who was the chief archivist of the Meridian Institute?

needles.text: The 1962 deep-cave expedition was led by a geologist named Tomas Brennan.
needles.question: Who led the 1962 deep-cave expedition?

needles.text: The Kappa battery plant is located in the city of Ostrava.
needles.question: In which city is the Kappa battery plant located?

needles.text: The Lindqvist radio observatory sits on a plateau outside the town of Kiruna.
needles.question: Near which town is the Lindqvist radio observatory located?

needles.text: At peak load the Solaris reactor produced exactly 1,840 megawatts.
needles.question: How many megawatts did the Solaris reactor produce at peak load? Answer with the number.

needles.text: The restored archive contained 27,506 catalogued volumes in total.
needles.question: How many catalogued volumes did the restored archive contain? Answer with the number.
